---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggforce)
diffs <- read_csv("diff_at_each_measurement.csv")

diffs <- diffs |> 
  mutate(measured = case_when(
    name == "F2021_to_S2022" ~ "Diff F21 to F22",
    name == "F2021_to_F2024" ~ "Diff F21 to 24-25",
    name == "F2021_to_S2025" ~ "Diff F21 to 24-25"
  )) 

diffs <- diffs |>
  group_by(Transect)|>
  mutate(Raw_meas_point = Measurement_Point)|>
  mutate(Measurement_Point =
           Measurement_Point - Measurement_Point[1])
```

```{r}

diffs |>
  drop_na(value, measured) |>
  filter(Transect <= 12) |>
ggplot(aes(x = Measurement_Point, 
                      y = value,
                      color = measured))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  facet_wrap(facets = "Transect",scales = "free" )+
  theme_classic()
```

```{r}
# ---- settings ----
out_file <- "transects_3x3_pages.pdf"  # output PDF
nrow_grid <- 3
ncol_grid <- 3
per_page  <- nrow_grid * ncol_grid

# total number of pages required
n_pages <- ceiling(n_distinct(diffs$Transect) / per_page)

# open PDF device
pdf(out_file, width = 10, height = 8)

for (i in seq_len(n_pages)) {
  p <- diffs |>
    drop_na(value, measured) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = Measurement_Point,
               y = value,
               color = measured)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
    ggforce::facet_wrap_paginate(
      facets = vars(Transect),
      scales = "free",
      nrow = nrow_grid, ncol = ncol_grid,
      page = i
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-20, 20)) +  # y axis fixed
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 125)) +  # y axis fixed
    theme_classic() +
    ggtitle(paste("Transects • Page", i, "of", n_pages))

  print(p)  # one page per plot
}

dev.off()

cat("Saved:", normalizePath(out_file), "\n")
```
with erosion vals
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)
library(dplyr)

totchange <- read_csv("total change by transect in cm2.csv")

# ---- inputs ----
# diffs: long data with columns Transect, Measurement_Point, value, measured
# erosion_df: per-transect totals with columns Transect, erosion

out_file  <- "transects_3x3_pages.pdf"
nrow_grid <- 3
ncol_grid <- 3
per_page  <- nrow_grid * ncol_grid

# make sure we only label transects that exist in diffs (and order them)
transect_levels <- diffs |> distinct(Transect) |> arrange(Transect) |> pull(Transect)

# build a named vector mapping Transect -> label text for the facet strips
lab_tbl <- totchange |>
  filter(Transect %in% transect_levels) |>
  mutate(.lab = paste0("Transect ", Transect, "\nErosion (cm2) F21-F24_25: ", round(F2021_to_F2024_cm2, 2)))

lab_map <- setNames(lab_tbl$.lab, lab_tbl$Transect)


n_pages <- ceiling(length(transect_levels) / per_page)

pdf(out_file, width = 10, height = 8)

for (i in seq_len(n_pages)) {
  p <- diffs |>
    drop_na(value, measured) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = Measurement_Point, y = value, color = measured)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
    ggforce::facet_wrap_paginate(
      facets  = vars(Transect),
      labeller = labeller(Transect = lab_map),  # <<< add erosion in strip
      scales  = "free_x",
      nrow    = nrow_grid,
      ncol    = ncol_grid,
      page    = i
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-20, 20)) +        # keep y fixed to [-20, 20] without dropping data
    theme_classic() +
    ggtitle(paste("Transects • Page", i, "of", n_pages))

  print(p)
}

dev.off()

cat("Saved:", normalizePath(out_file), "\n")

```
